mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.real_name AS creatorName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE event_id = e.id AND status = 'enrolled') AS enrolled_count FROM events e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.creator_id = u.id WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.*, u.real_name AS creatorName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE event_id = e.id AND status = 'enrolled') AS enrolled_count FROM events e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.creator_id = u.id ORDER BY e.event_date DESC

SELECT e.*, u.real_name AS creatorName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE event_id = e.id AND status = 'enrolled') AS enrolled_count FROM events e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.creator_id = u.id WHERE e.status = #{status}

SELECT e.*, u.real_name AS creatorName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE event_id = e.id AND status = 'enrolled') AS enrolled_count FROM events e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.creator_id = u.id WHERE e.creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events (title, description, event_date, start_time, end_time, location, max_players, status, creator_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{eventDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{maxPlayers}, #{status}, #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, event_date = #{eventDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, max_players = #{maxPlayers} WHERE id = #{id}
